actions.name: Add item
actions.description: Append a new item to the end of the list of available choices.

actions.name: Add item at
actions.description: Insert a new item to the list of available choices at a certain zero-based index.

actions.name: Clear
actions.description: Remove all the available choices from the list.

actions.name: Remove
actions.description: Delete an item at a specific index.

actions.name: Set item text
actions.description: Change the text of an item at a specific index.

actions.name: Set selection
actions.description: Set the item at a specific index as selected.

actions.name: Set tooltip
actions.description: Set the Tooltip property of the object, displayed by most browsers when hovering the mouse over the control.

conditions.name: Compare item text at
conditions.description: Compare the text of a given item in the list.

conditions.name: Compare selected item text
conditions.description: Compare the text of the currently selected item in the list.

conditions.name: Compare selection
conditions.description: Compare the zero-based index of the currently selected item.

conditions.name: On clicked
conditions.description: Triggered when the control is clicked.

conditions.name: On double-clicked
conditions.description: Triggered when the control is double-clicked.

conditions.name: On selection changed
conditions.description: Triggered whenever the chosen selection in the control is changed. This can be by any means of input (such as a mouse click, keyboard press, or touch input on mobile).

expressions.name: ItemCount
expressions.description: The current number of items in the list.

expressions.name: ItemTextAt
expressions.description: Return the text of an item at a zero-based index in the list.

expressions.name: SelectedCount
expressions.description: The number of currently selected items. This will always be either 0 or 1 unless a list box with Multi-select enabled is used.

expressions.name: SelectedIndex
expressions.description: The zero-based index of the currently selected item. For multi-select lists, use SelectedIndexAt instead.

expressions.name: SelectedIndexAt
expressions.description: The index of a selected item out of all the selected items. In other words, SelectedIndexAt with numbers 0 to SelectedCount - 1 gives the indices of all the selected items.

expressions.name: SelectedText
expressions.description: The text of the currently selected item. For multi-select lists, use SelectedTextAt instead.

expressions.name: SelectedTextAt
expressions.description: The text of a selected item out of all the selected items. In other words, SelectedTextAt with numbers 0 to SelectedCount - 1 gives the text of each selected item.
